# Project 3 - SQL Data Analysis

## Objective

The objective of this project is to use SQL queries to extract useful information and insights from the dataset.

## Tools Used

* Python
* SQLite
* Pandas
* VS Code

## SQL Operations Performed

* SELECT
* WHERE
* ORDER BY
* GROUP BY
* COUNT()
* SUM()
* AVG()

## Insights Obtained

* Identified the most frequently ordered products.
* Calculated revenue generated by each product category.
* Determined average revenue per product.
* Retrieved high-value orders using filtering conditions.

## Files Included

* sql_analysis.py
* Dataset for Data Analytics (3).xlsx

## Author

Completed as part of the DecodeLabs Data Analytics Internship.
